mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_group_to_private_follow (lead_id, member_id, follow_status, follow_remark, operator_id) VALUES (#{leadId}, #{memberId}, #{followStatus}, #{followRemark}, #{operatorId})
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.lead_id AS leadId, f.member_id AS memberId, f.follow_status AS followStatus, f.follow_remark AS followRemark, f.operator_id AS operatorId, DATE_FORMAT(f.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, (SELECT username FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = f.operator_id) AS operatorName FROM pt_group_to_private_follow f WHERE f.lead_id = #{value} ORDER BY f.id DESC
